reviews.review_description: Blaston has a lot, and I mean A LOT in store! Sure maybe it isn’t the most alive game, but Blaston has community funded tournaments, a wholesome community and ALIVE community, and that’s not even it, this game offers physical rewards too! Blaston is so much more niche then other games where it requires you to physically move your WHOLR BODY other than most other vr games where you need to SWING YOUR ARMS. I’m not going to even sugarcoat everything simply just load into the multiplayer Ozo Lounge at 3/7 pm your time zone and you will find out yourself, overall, play Blaston and find out!

It is crazy that nobody has made a game that matched Blaston since. Truly the game to utilize VR tech and movement and competitive multiplayer the greatest, whilst giving you a full body workout. There was so much depth too and it truly felt like learning a sport. I hope Resolution makes a second Blaston one day, I think it would be an even greater success if marketed well.

developer_response.body: Thank you for those encouraging words :) let's see what the future of VR holds

reviews.review_description:
I raised concerns about what I believe to be racist behavior, bullying involving minors and adults, and inappropriate conduct within the community. After speaking up, I experienced what I feel was retaliatory action, including being removed from the game without clear evidence or a transparent explanation.

When others shared their own reviews or opinions, I believe similar actions were taken against them. From my perspective, the moderation process lacked fairness and factual support.

I encourage anyone interested to review the public feedback on Facebook regarding Resolution Games and Blaston. I am prepared to share documented information about my experience publicly.
if you play blaston please start using voice chat the game feels kind of silent also please add a multiplayer lobby you know and please add 2v2 and 3v3😫
It may be a Dead game but I don't care It's Incredibly Fun, I especially love running Hazard and Strike Builds.
One of the best games for Quest 3! Fun and exercise in the same time.
Um the game won't load at all pls help
i don't have a very large space to do vr games in so it makes dodging certain things imbossible to dodge, adding joystick controls would make the game more accesible for those with smaller spaces

Honestly, this is such a fun game. It is way more fun if you have someone else to play with, the controllers feel really nice, but you do need a kind of wide space to play (I almost break my TV) and there are soo many modes to explore too

reviews.review_title: More than what you think it is!
reviews.review_description:
It's not easy to get into the game with the current player count; but the deeper you go and the more you learn about this game, the better it gets.
Even with the lack of players, tournament prizes in this game go upwards of $500. Why? Because the community this game has KNOW that it's the pinnacle of VR's competitive potential.
The game allows you to choose 6 weapons and some modifications to make a loadout and 1v1 other players for ranked points, moving in real life in order to move in the game. As you fight different players, especially through Blaston's social system the Ozo Lounge, it's clear to see that each individual brings skills to the table unique to them. And if you stick around long enough, you'll create something new yourself.
This game NEEDS more players for it to truly shine, so please: join the Discord or hang out in the lounge, get to know the top talent, and you will see for yourself why this is one of the absolute best games that VR has to offer.

reviews.review_title: Great game but bots need to be harder
reviews.review_description: So I’m brand new and I love this already. The game is fantastic, though as most commenters have said since the player base is smaller, it needs to have harder bots. They’re too easy. It should rank base scale difficulty. If the bots would be harder it would be easy 10/10 for me but still amazing game for what it is. My new favourite

reviews.review_title: Don't play this game.. Unless ur like me
reviews.review_description:
Hi. I wrote a previous review on the 23rd of July last year, and came back because there was some attention given. You see, my buddy found a YouTube video with my review, and also told me it was the top review on the game. The truth is... this game is a game you should play. Sure, it's got a whole bunch of bugs and an unreasonably low player base full of weirdos sometimes, but I couldn't care less and love this game so much I could squeeze the life out of it. The truth also is... it was a desperate attempt to get the attention of Resultion Games. I made this review and didn't want it to have an effect on people, although it did. I just wanted to bait the dev company.
But, nonetheless, I want to tell you everything about this game that I love, and cover some of the things that make this game, unfortunately, kinda wack.

POSITIVES:

1. Amazing learning curve. I play this game as much as I can to learn new things, anyway possible. It's a fun spin to challenge your physique and smash knowledge into your brain.
2. Friendly community. If there's a rude player you find, it's a good chance we don't like that player either. The majority of us are simple human beings who would love to battle you.
3. Great cardio. Jumping, ducking, dashing, and lunging are just a few examples of the things you catch up a sweat with. Learning movement and dodging will make you lose some calories really quickly.


NEGATIVES:

1. Many minor bugs. When you start playing more and more, you'll get annoyed by some of the bugs you can find out of the blue. Most bugs, however, don't impact the state of the game.
2. Random crashes/freezes. Low memory bugs galore, and in ranked matches, they can lose you a whole game.
3. Low player base. Not really a problem with the game; anyone could play if they want to, and fix this issue. But no one has discovered this masterpiece game to really put its word out there.

If you join this great community, these negatives will become meaningless. Join us. And Blaston.
This games main problem is the low player count it just really needs some traction. And add a minigun🤑🤑🤑 jk "seriously tho more content pls"
Fun and can be a workout.
The bots make it not fun

Lots of fun!

Runs just fine as of today.

Keep adding more content!

Highly recommend a try!

Reserving the final start for the final release.
The game is really fun but the campaign is to easy and it won't let me continue the campaign at all I only beat 2 people

Thank you for helping us improve the game.

reviews.review_description:
There's not enough cosmetics and all the best cosmetics are locked behind a currency they force you to spend which is far too slow to earn.
The weapon unlocks are painful and tedious, a waste of time when you can only plan for one unlock at a time. 
I have literally no incentive to log in and play this on a daily basis. There is no real community and it feels more time was spent trying to make space for one at the expense of gameplay.
Feels like it still has a lot of potential but also blaston feels practically abandoned already.

Give me a reason for me and my friends to log in other than 'number go up'.
the game is fun and befor the spectator update the comunitje was cool too but it has ben dieing
definitely a keeper. battle with your friend is fun. clean style

I love this game dearly, I've been playing now for just about 2-3 years and have close to around 700 hours, and this game will never disappoint, if you haven't already, you need to give this game a shot, I'm not usually a fan of 1v1 styled games but this one is a exception, it does the whole genre differently, this game rewards all types of skills levels based on how you want to play and customizing your loadout to suit your style, I generally play faster and like quick setup combos, but if that's not your thing you can slow the game down, play more defensive, or play a trapper like play style with lasers/cages, the community is great, I've been involved on basically every scene, from competitive to moderator to content creator to event organizer for the game, it's amazing, everyone's willing to give advice and help teach you.

If you haven't already, please give this game a try, it deserves it.

I keep deleting my review and editing it every year. It's 2024 (almost 2025) and this game still holds as the best multiplayer competitive game out there in vr. Truly the best. I really wish more folks would play this game.
No new maps, new guns or a 2vs2 mode a 4 person free for all could be added but the game is just dying out
You can play it in short bursts, moving around wirelessly especially in mixed reality (watch your surroundings!) is priceless!
Crazy fun game, I love it
Excellent game if you’re just getting started in VR

As a top player of the game. I have to say this game has been the #1 game I've been playing over the last 4 years. It is fast paced, fun and will leave you caked in sweat. The skill ceiling of this game is high and it's a fantastic way to immerse yourself in a VR shooter.
You'll be dodging, sliding on the floor, jumping and moving constantly throughout the duels. Get your shower ready, you'll need it after playing this one. Oh and don't forget to check out the Blaston Discord Server for tips and tricks. There's a lot more to this game then what meets the eye.

Forget any other exercise app, this one has you covered on all bases. Exciting, immersive, fast paced, and will have your heart racing after one match. I've only tried maybe a dozen games so far but this is the first one that made me glad to own a vr headset. If you like shooting games this ones for you

It’s a good game but when I spend hours on hours on the game and like 3 all nighters to get to champion and I play one match and this guy who sucks and spams lazers so I can’t move to doge and then uses the most over powered weapon to spam me with and now I barely on silver and I can’t even get different weapons to fight with cus I get spammed so often
It’s one of the best games you can get for free. you should definitely get it get this to 5 ⭐️!

I can play for an hour without finding a single player to duel and I'm tired of dueling bots. Went to Discord for more information and 'looking for game options', but Discord channel appears mostly dead. Uninstalling.

The core game is fun.
But all the live service systems (leveling up tracking blueprints, collecting in-game currencies, unlocking things) hold this game back.

It makes it feel like a mobile game that's just a machine, designed to engage you with micro transactions.

And it makes this game feel like homework.

But at least you always find an opponent quickly, even if all matches are very similar.
(There isn't much room for strategy)

reviews.review_title: One of the best games for Oculus. Period
reviews.review_description:
I've recently downloaded the game and it blew me away on how simple and fun it can be. I read some of the reviews and honestly I did not know what to expect. 

Is similar to a western shooter where two cowboys face each other, but that's where similarities end. You pick up weapons  from around you and then shoot the oponent while trying to avoid the oponent's projectiles. Trust me, you will sweat and have loads of fun.
It offers a nice progression system, lots of weapons, ranked / unranked matches and a social pub where you can hang out with friends.

Trust me, this is a must buy for any new Oculus owners.

Just got it. Perhaps I didn't play it enough yet, or I'm doing the wrong thing, but so far this game is BORING and slow. It would be the last game I'd show to friend who has never seen VR. 

Also, can we get an age filter? I don't want to play with or talk to underage kids. I like kids, but I'll play with my own.
This game is a great online game I’ve been playing with my dad Best shooter I’ve ever played 10 out of 10￼

I love this game. It is a ton of fun! The devs update it often and they care about their community. It’s only 10 bucks so don’t hesitate, it’s a great game and you won’t regret buying it. Plus, if you get grandmaster rank (1000 points) you can request another copy of the game on the discord server and you may get one. Also, there is a pretty sweet campaign as well. Though it isn’t too long, it is fun. There is also the “Ozo Lounge”. This is where you can hang out with your friends and talk with them. There is so much to do for $10 I can’t fit it all in here. Stop reading this and just buy Blaston! It’s for your own good!

This game will ruin the VR world by allowing Facebook to harass us with ads so that they can make more money. I already paid for the game sadly but I will not play this game ever again. Facebook is the evil company from Ready player one and these developers are more than happy to sell their souls.
Blaston could have made waves, though it has been discovered they are adding the use of ads to their PAID game, do not buy this the only way to combat ads in paid games is to not buy them.

developer_response.body: Update: After digging deeper and listening to player feedback, we realize that Blaston isn’t the best fit for this type of advertising test. Therefore, we no longer plan to implement the test in Blaston. If you want to share any additional feedback on this, please join our Discord server: discord.gg/blaston

reviews.review_description: I bought this game from a bundle with this game and another game. i was originally only looking to buy the other game, but the bundle was only $2 more. anyway i played the other game for a while and forgot about this game. a few days later i decided to try it out. that day i played till my quest died, charged it and ran the battery out again and again. this game has become one of my go-to games. just buy it.
Won’t be playing this game anymore now that they’ve decided to go with ads in game

reviews.review_title: One of the best, now with ads
reviews.review_description:
ANOTHER EDIT TO ME REVIEW: The decision to place advertisements into Blaston has been rescinded. Keep ads out of paid games or you will see a backlash like this every time.

EDIT TO MY REVIEW: Putting ads in your paid game to “”further develop”” Blaston is a baaaaad move. I’m extremely disappointed with this move, and seriously hope you realize how this makes your fans feel about your products going forward. Demeo will be the last game of yours I purchase unless you take a stance against this. Ads on paid games is a slippery slope, don’t let yourselves be the beginning of the avalanche. 

Original review:

Listen to the other reviews, this game is fantastic. It's one of the only VR games other than Superhot where getting hit feels like a true detriment, and weaving your body around works surprisingly well considering it only tracks your hands and head.

It's like a 1v1 fighting game mixed with a bullethell and I'm here for it.

Also the devs give a free copy of the game away on their discord when you reach Platinum, which isnt hard to do at all!!

It's a shame because there is a lot to like about this game. The problem is that it's populated with toxic players who make rude hand gestures and seem to be playing out some sad playground bully fantasy. I had three in  row last night and it gets tedious to say the least (I just yawn back at them).  So pathetic they don't even know how to win with grace. And on this basis I regret buying the game. Despite what they say the devs have not done enough to tackle this behaviour (imho).

developer_response.body: Hi there! If you run into someone who is being rude or doing any improper gestures you can report them after the match in the settings. We manually and carefully take a look at all reports that come in, and should we see any players that are doing anything regarded as toxic we ban them. We hope we can help each other to maintain the game and community a fun and safe space! Thank you for playing Blaston.

reviews.review_description: Make sure you have enough space. Learn that weapons need to be used as combos and you can dodge EVERYTHING. Get mobile, get strategic, and get this game.

It clearly states it has both Multiplayer and Single Player modes, as well as explicitly stating that you can play against AI bots. Well neither of those things are true. You are forced to play Multiplayer and cannot ever choose to play against bots. Digging into their support it confirms this. You play AI only if it can't find a Multiplayer match. "In general, the game decides when to match you against a player or a bot, so in that sense there’s no single or multiplayer but a mixed mode."
This needs to be made clear here at point of sale for those of us who care about that non-option. Currently it's very misleading as well as non-functional for PvAI. Seeking refund now. The onus is on you to provide very basic clarity and not mislead.

developer_response.body:
Update: we have added an option to play against Bots only. We hope that you will appreciate this new feature :)

Thank you for sharing this with us. We're really sorry to hear that you feel mislead by our communication. We're really taking this to heart and we constantly strive to do better in our promotion of the game. Please just know that this hasn't gone unnoticed.

reviews.review_description: Well first off, if you like exercise, than this I your game. You’ll love it. Others who don’t appreciate too much movement won’t really like it. But if you are a beginner(who enjoys a bit of exercise) this game is perfect. It isn’t too hard and the controls are easy to learn. I personally love exercise and this game! It is very fun and gets you in the mood. You all know that mood.(No explaining needed). The game has very nice users but it is very competitive. I don’t mind that but some people will. So I probably wouldn’t get it if this is your case. Blaston does have bots but you will rarely see them. Great game! Love it!

reviews.review_title: This is the pinnacle of VR on Quest
reviews.review_description:
This game is the pinnacle of VR gaming, at least for the Quest, & a third of the price of most big VR titles.

This is one of the only games I have played that actually feels as if it takes full advantage of every aspect of VR and could not exist outside of VR. It is competitive in the same way actual sports are competitive, where the competition comes down to athleticism and coordination rather than quick scoping and k/d ratios. This is like the first real VR sport, and it's nothing like any IRL sports because you could not play this IRL or anywhere but in VR. Similarly any IRL sports ported to VR always feel incomplete without being able to actually run around. This game never feels incomplete since it was designed with the limitations of VR in mind.

It has nearly unlimited replay value even with a repetitive gameplay loop, which is something extremely difficult to achieve even in multimillion AAA games. Blaston is like 2020s Pacman. I havent slept all night, its 5am and I've gotten out of bed to write this review and play more of this game after taking a break not out of boredom but out of physical exhaustion. I still think there is plenty of room to innovate and create even better gameplay in VR, but as of right now I dont think anything surpasses Blaston. It's like they took the physical intesity of Beat Saber, combined it with the bullet dodging and shooting of Superhot, then made it into a competitive multiplayer game. 

All the Rhythm games, FPS and Pongs available on VR right now involve the same gameplay thats been around for decades and they closely mimic the Wii, except now it's in VR, and the simulator games are cool, but more like a toy than a game IMO.

Blaston gameplay is something that could not have even been conceptualized prior to VR. Physically juking, ducking, jumping and sliding around my room dodging bullets while simultaneously aiming and firing a gun is the most satisfying entertainment I've experienced indoors alone in my life. I am 24 and this game makes me feel like I'm 8.

Echo VR is the only one that comes anywhere close and it still just isnt quite as "purely" fun. Partly because Echo requires two evenly matched teams of 4 each to truly be what it should be, and partly because locomotion and maneuvering in Echo is slightly more annoying and involves a lot of spinning. The restrictions on movement that the podiums impose in Blaston actually make the movement that does occur ten times more enjoyable, and it only needs 2 evenly matched players to be really good, plus the rank based matchmaking helps match you with people on a similar skill level.

The only drawback I have to mention is this game will beat you up. My muscles are sore, I have knocked glassware off of my tables and spilled water everywhere, I have slammed my controllers into the wall trying to grab guns. 

It would be cool if y'all could make sure guns dont spawn outside guardian boundaries for those of us with small apartments.

My biggest tip to new players, if you want to compete on the leaderboards make sure you are only playing when you are feeling your best. Once I get tired out after a string of matches, even the day after with sore muscles, I can not move as quickly and I start losing matches which lowers my rank. Even though I dont want to stop playing because I'm having so much fun I have to force myself to take 24hr+ breaks to recuperate.

PLEASE DO NOT FORGET TO SHOWER AFTER PLAYING

I'm Plex in game!

I read another review asking for more game modes, like 1 shot sudden death, 1 gun only, 3 gun only, viper-only, shotgun-only, etc and I wanted to second that. I've seen a couple ppl talking about 2v2 matches, that could be cool but I would really like a 1v1v1 match where 3 people all fight each other in a triangle.

Another idea, since bullets have HP it would be cool if guns also had HP and you could shoot and destroy spawned weapons before your enemy grabs them, but not after. Hitboxes would be cool too, like a shot in the head has 2x damage, shot on the neck has 1.5x, shot on the hand has 1.2x, etc with the chest being the base 1x damage zone, maybe with a small upper right heart box that also does 2x if that's possible.

Tournaments/weekend events/limited time gametypes would also be cool, Tournaments could even have a buy-in to enter, so you have to wager some credits and you'll get more back the further you go. Exclusive rewards! Maybe too much for a smaller tournament, but it would be cool if the top 3 every season each got something like one alternate color scheme for one gun each, or an exclusive podium, I think that would be more interesting than just rewarding them with credits to buy things anyone could buy without fighting for top 3. Plus more reward tiers! Like everyone top 10 gets 1000c, top 100 gets 500c, top 1000 gets 200c, top 5000 get 50c. 

One more idea, this may not work but maybe it would, some sort of powerup/debuff system? Like some orb appears between the podiums a few times each match, if you shoot it first you get faster spawn times for vipers, or you get 3s invulnerability, or you get tracking on your next shot, or your opponent gets slower spawn times for shields, etc. Or they could appear behind you/behind your opponent and you have to choose whether the best option is to shoot at the powerup, directly at your opponent, or at the weapons they havent grabbed yet. All that might be better as a separate game type from the classic duel though.

Edit: love the new duel options <3

developer_response.body: Thank you so, so much for taking time out of your day (or night in this case) to go in to such detail of what you think about the game. It's greatly appreciated and it's awesome to receive all these suggestions as well. See you in the arena! :)

reviews.review_description: Very addictive fun game...just needs some more exotic weapons.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We would love to hear more about what kind of weapons you'd like to see in the game. Please feel free to email us at support@resolutiongames.com.

reviews.review_description: My first vr game, great if you want to avoid motion sickness. Really good fun and workout. Easy to pickup and put down casually.
good game for 1 vs 1 fun. It does well what it has, l just wish it had more.
It’s a really nice shooter game
Super fun, skill based and competitive. Also a really good workout during these lockdowns

I have been playing this for a few days and it’s been an insane exercise for me, especially when getting to the higher ranks.

There are a lot of people online and even when queueing you fight bots who can still put up a good fight.

All in all I think this is an amazing game for €9,99 if you are into 1v1 competitive games or into real life bullet hells (since it plays like one)

This game is legit the most fun I've ever had playing a 1v1 game with a friend. We were rolling over the floor dodging each others attacks. The rules are simple but there's so much to technique you can learn and use. Also a lot of nice unlockable content that makes it worth playing for hours on end. My only wish is a 2v2 mode together with a friend against others around the world.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're happy to hear that you're having fun with Blaston. We'll continue to support the game and add content, so we appreciate the suggestions for new modes that we will direct to the developers!

reviews.review_description: I actually love this game because it gets me moving lol
Great game, super addictive and good workout

This game is FUN FUN FUN! (And a total workout; 20 minutes gets my cardio going.) Blaston does an amazing job of teaching you *how* to move and play in 3d space within VR. The progression and level up system is perfect, there's multiple hangout rooms with mini games, TONS of skins/guns/items to unlock, equals infinite replay value. BUY THIS GAME!

reviews.review_title: A review on the pros and cons
reviews.review_description:
I have only had Blaston for a few days but it’s easily my favorite game. It’s just as good as beat saber and has only been out for 2 months and has already had 5 patches and 2 of those were big with new weapons and stuff. Blaston is a 1v1 multiplayer game where you chose a load out of 6 weapons witch include big slow moving orbs, fast moving bullets and everything in between. I will now state some reasons to why you should get it/should not get it to help you decide

PROS:
- Amazing workout and you won’t even know it until when you wake up the next day the first thing you will feel is a pain in your calf (it’s a good pain) that will remind you of how much fun you had. 
- The devs are on discord daily and listen to the community and are very active at fixing bugs and adding new content. 
- you can unlock everything in the game without using micro transactions but they do speed up the process 

CONS:
- There are micro transactions which do not do anything but speed up the process of unlocking everything. Although that may ruin it for some people. 
-Theres only 1 thing to do and it’s a 1v1 multiplayer duel. Hopefully they add a bot you can practice agist or 2v2 or tournaments

Now some things that I would like to see in the game:

-more things to do like 2v2s or tournaments or even an offline bot that has 3 levels, easy medium and hard
-special game modes like 1 shot 1 kill, only 3 guns, viper only etc and they could rotate every few days or have it be exclusive of the weekends. 
-more weapons! Maybe a healing device that gives you health but can only be used 1 time per round. 
- put bot ___ so you know if your playing a bot or real player
-a friend system so you can play with people

I’m sure the devs have big plans for this game because it’s truly something unique and special. I could see this game becoming one of the best VR games. Oh yes one last thing, the community is why you should get this game. I literally had a dance battle instead of a fight with 1 opponent and I was fighting someone who was clearly gonna win but I signaled for him to stop because I had to do something and he waited. It was a very special moment. I hope to see you out there some day!

developer_response.body: We really appreciate this in-depth review. Thanks for taking the time to submit it. We have saved all of our points on our precious vault of feedback and will take them all into consideration. :)

reviews.review_description: This games dope
It’s honestly so worth the 10 dollars, I highly recommend this game especially to play against friends

reviews.review_title: I wish there is offline mode
reviews.review_description: It really fun game, I wish I could play it without wifi and I wish the bots are much stronger.

it's exiting and intererting but it's too simple. if there were some other contents i'll give 5stars to this game.

Such a fun game! You get really competitive and getting new weapons and leveling up is addiciting, in a good way. This game is a very good way to get a good day's workout! Never stay still! For the price and gameplay 5/5! A must buy!
